commands.review_summary:
The PR updates gateway `chat.abort` session matching so explicit channel-scoped session keys can stop hidden channel runs, and adds authorization/persistence regression tests.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +64. Total +84 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sends WebChat stop requests through `chat.abort` with the selected session key, while the gateway filters hidden registered and pending agent runs before session matching. I did not run a live WeChat/WebChat reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real behavior proof, not a narrow code repair that automation can safely produce.

target.title: fix: WebChat stop fails for WeChat channel sessions
target.body:
Related: #91987

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users trying to stop a looping WeChat/channel agent from WebChat could see `/stop` fail when the active run belonged to an explicit channel session.

## Why This Change Was Made

WebChat converts typed stop commands into `chat.abort`, and channel-routed runs are hidden from the normal Control UI active-run projection. This change keeps hidden runs protected from broad visible session keys like `main`, while allowing explicit channel-scoped keys such as `agent:main:openclaw-weixin:direct:...` to abort hidden runs for that same selected session.

The same targeting rule applies to both registered active runs and pending pre-registered agent runs, covering the short startup window before the abort controller is fully registered.

## User Impact

Users can stop a looping WeChat/channel agent from WebChat when they are viewing that channel session. Broad visible session keys still do not accidentally stop hidden internal runs.

## Evidence

- `pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-authorization.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-persistence.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/chat.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-authorization.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-persistence.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Notes:
- `pnpm test:changed` was attempted; the default run hit a sandbox `.git/openclaw-local-checks` lock permission error, and the worktree-lock retry sat in `vitest.unit-fast.config.ts` without output until interrupted.
- `pnpm check:changed -- src/gateway/server-methods/chat.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-authorization.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-persistence.test.ts` was attempted, but local Crabbox wrapper sanity checks failed before running the remote check.
